metadata.title: SAP - Lock User (Agentless Basic)
metadata.description: This playbook locks an SAP user when triggered by a Microsoft Sentinel incident. It dynamically finds SAP-specific alert details across all alerts in the incident, supporting complex multi-alert incidents from Defender XDR.
metadata.prerequisites: 1. SAP Integration Suite (CPI) with user lock/unlock iFlow deployed. 2. OAuth client credentials for SAP BTP. 3. Microsoft Teams channel for notifications. 4. Sentinel Responder role for the Logic App managed identity.

metadata.description: Name of the Logic App resource to be created
Email (UPN) of the admin to notify on playbook errors via Teams bot chat
OAuth2 token endpoint for SAP Integration Suite (e.g. https://<subdomain>.authentication.<region>.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token)
OAuth2 client ID for SAP Integration Suite
OAuth2 client secret for SAP Integration Suite
Microsoft Teams Team ID for incident notifications (configure post-deployment if unknown)
Microsoft Teams Channel ID for incident notifications (configure post-deployment if unknown)

body.message: SAP Lock User playbook: No SAP alert with actionable Custom Details (SAP_User + AgentGuid) was found across all @{length(triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['alerts'])} alerts in this incident. Manual review recommended.

body.updateMessage: Thanks for keeping SAP on Azure secure!

classification.ClassificationReasonText: @{coalesce(body('Parse_card_response')?['data']?['blockComment'], 'User locked via SAP Lock User playbook')}

body.messageBody: ❌ SAP User @{variables('SAP_User')} could not be locked. Error (code @{outputs('Block_User_via_SAP')['statusCode']}): @{body('Block_User_via_SAP')}
ℹ️ User @{variables('SAP_User')} would be disabled on Microsoft Entra ID. Add the Entra ID connector "Disable user" action to this playbook to enable this feature.
ℹ️ Implement SAP REST interfaces with SAP Cloud Identity Services or OAuth2 flow to lock users on XSUAA with property "active:false". See advanced version of this playbook as a blueprint.
⏰ SAP incident notification timed out after 30 minutes! Please review the incident manually in Sentinel/Defender portal.

⚠️ SAP Lock User playbook: Failed to extract SAP details from the Sentinel incident. Please review the incident manually.

Incident: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['title']}

⚠️ SAP Lock User playbook: Incident response processing failed or timed out. Please review the incident and process it manually.

Incident: @{triggerBody()?['object']?['properties']?['title']}
